page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a storage-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 80 dedicated vCPUs, mapping to 80 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring consistent compute performance without hyper-threading resource contention.

This instance is equipped with 704.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 8.8 GB of RAM per core. A defining characteristic of the ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is its integrated local storage, which consists of 19,198 GB of solid-state drive capacity. This massive local storage volume is bundled directly with the instance, making it suitable for high-throughput, low-latency data access.

Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfers across cloud environments. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation, combining substantial compute power, large memory capacity, and extensive local SSD storage into a single node. This configuration is optimized for demanding workloads such as large-scale relational databases, NoSQL databases, big data analytics, and high-performance storage systems that require direct access to high-capacity local SSDs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a high-capacity, storage-optimized instance designed for data-intensive workloads. Built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture, it is powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance delivers 80 dedicated vCPUs across 80 physical cores with a single thread per core, eliminating hyper-threading overhead. It features 704.0 GB of RAM, translating to 8.8 GB per core, and is bundled with 19,198 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. This resource-dense hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for applications requiring massive local storage and high memory capacity. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, distributed file systems, and intensive data processing tasks.
